blocks.content: Satan revealed his killing intent.

blocks.speaker: Satan
blocks.content: What are they planning…
The captains of the guards from each nation drew their weapons.

blocks.speaker: Satan
blocks.content: If we get caught in Vanishing, it's over. Should we strike first?

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: Attacking based on killing intent alone would be controversial later, but it was different if the target was Havitz.
Havitz's killing intent vanished, and he calmly walked over to Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Havitz
blocks.content: This will be fun.
Fortunately, no commotion occurred, but the onlookers felt even more uneasy.
That was the essence of extreme evil.
Paras, Mun, and Gustav entered the main building in order of arrival.
The leaders of each nation left for safety.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Empire of Jinchun! Enter the inner castle!
As the procession of the Jinchun Empire arrived at sunset, Shirone observed Jingang's face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's become even more gaunt.
It was likely because his daughter was in hell.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Jingang is a formidable man.
Albino approached.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: No nation has escaped the war unscathed, but Jinchun still has the largest population in the world. Their brain is the Jinchun Space Agency, led by a woman named Anchal. She's an alum of yours, isn't she?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Anchal dropped out midway, though.
Albino stroked his beard.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: The Triumvirate has fallen, but three empires still support this world: Kashan, Gustav, and Jinchun. Other nations will likely try to ally with one of them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's true that I have a personal connection with the king of Jinchun, but he won't let personal feelings affect his decisions.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: You never know.
Albino's laughter was irritating.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Is there anything in the world not influenced by personal feelings? People claim to act for the greater good, but that too comes from the heart. There are many ways to corner someone. Especially you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Albino.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I want to make it clear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Jingang sent his daughter to hell. She saved humanity. Doesn't that mean anything?

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: I'm not trying to fight you.
Albino remained calm.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Once we clash, things will work out. The result will come, like mixing hot and cold water. The question is, who will drink it? You came to the Holy War as a representative of Tormia because you know the people here best. In other words, they're easy to control.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I…

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Do you want to call it trust? Fine. Everyone makes their own choices. If your value is exceptional, I'll try to win your favor too. But…
Albino shrugged as he turned away.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Who knows what will happen?
As Shirone watched Albino walk away, Lupist approached.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Don't take it to heart. He's here for the future of Tormia's people.
His words were inevitably cold.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Honestly, I understand. I'm grateful you chose Tormia. It would be great if Yahweh saves humanity. But what happens after? It's back to competition between nations. I don't want to see Tormia fall when that time comes. Albino knows that too.
Lupist turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: You are the key figure with the widest and deepest connections at the Holy War. In a way, you're like the 13th nation. Honestly, I want to use you. If you don't want that, you can refuse. But… let's not talk about betrayal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Betrayal.
As Shirone pondered, the Kingdom of Iron arrived.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: They have a rational political system. It's generally believed they won't stand out at the Holy War. They're moderately strong and flexible.
Next to King Basak of Iron was a familiar face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shura of the Council of Ten.
She had descended from the moon, where she was with the Buddha.
Lupist murmured,

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Why did she choose Iron?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because of Veron.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Veron issue.
Can humans change outcomes?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Only God can. But Veron left a possibility at the last moment.
The iron spike he planted in the Kingdom of Iron was still deeply embedded in the law.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: An outcome unaffected by causes. A pure will without any color.
It was a hint to challenge God.
Around midnight, the Southern Tribal Union and the Kingdom of Arakne, representing the Ten Island Kingdoms, arrived.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: They're not the core nations of this Holy War. But we need to watch the south. Many tribes united during the war. Their shamanisms combined into one. While Gaold's madness reduced the number of demons, the south is the only continent that has eradicated them, which is significant.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What about Arakne?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: They have many beauties,
causing Shirone to look at him.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Is there something wrong with what I said?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They're famous for hosting the World Beauty Contest. But if they're among the twelve nations in the Holy War, shouldn't we take them more seriously?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: You misunderstand.
Lupist pointed to Arakne.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: People are the same everywhere, but each country's philosophy differs. Arakne has studied beauty for decades. Children grow up dreaming of the World Beauty Contest. Their talent pool is vast, and this talent permeates their politics and society. It's said you can't secure even a small contract without a hostess.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, they're professionals.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Yes. In Arakne, beauty tactics are not just improvisation but strategy. And sometimes…
Lupist's expression turned bitter.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Beauty tactics can be more powerful than something like elemental bomb schematics. Especially in politics, where desire runs rampant.
Shirone observed the lavishly decorated carriages in Arakne's procession.
There were dozens of carriages that could hold ten people each, and Lupist was also watching them.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: They probably don't aim to become a leading nation. But they have enough influence to shake things up from behind the scenes. They want to gain as much as possible.
The Holy War held in the Kingdom of Jive.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kashan, Gustav, Jinchun.
The three empires.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Iron, Mun, Paras.
Traditional powers.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tormia, Kessia, Corona.
New forces participating in the Holy War for the first time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The South and Arakne.
Unknown variables yet to be understood.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's just beginning.
The doors to the Holy War opened.
Leaving the banquet hall, Shirone headed to Tormia's designated area as planned.
Security was tight from the corridor, and Yongrae's staff guided him to the meeting room.
Entering the room guarded by the Royal Guard, Pony, Albino, Lupist, and Plu were gathered around a table.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Did you find it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wanted you to hear the briefing. Did we interrupt?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No.
As Shirone took a seat at one end of the table, Plu walked to the front chart stand.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: This meeting is to check essential elements before the Holy War. Let's start the briefing.
Plu took out a pointer and indicated the large letters on the chart.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: The Holy War. An international union formed by countries with significant influence worldwide. The organization of the Holy War is divided into five main parts: General Assembly, Military Department, Economic and Social Department, Religious Department, and International Court. Usually, when we talk about the Holy War, we mean the General Assembly.
The pointer tapped on the chart.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: The Military Department is commonly known as Valkyrie. Until recently, Iruki from Tormia was the Chief Military Officer but is currently on leave due to emotional disease.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: We can't expect any favors then.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: No. However, their authority has been significantly reduced since the war. The Religious Department is overseen by the Pope of Lami faith, and the International Court is handled by Red Line Headquarters.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Who's the head? I heard they select someone who has chaired associations in various countries.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Currently, it's Mr. Bebeto Socrates. Nicknamed 'Fat Pig.' He chaired Yakma Republic's Magic Association for seven years.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Gaold must know him?

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Yes. I attended former association chair meetings with Mr. Gaold once. They didn't seem to get along well.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Who does that guy get along with?
Plu continued explaining,

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: The Holy War's subsidiary organizations include the World Climate Organization, World Health Organization, and World Communications Bureau. Delegations from these organizations will attend tomorrow's event.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Seriel was also on her way overnight.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: This concludes an overview of the Holy War. Now let's discuss its voting system.
As Shirone adjusted his expression, Plu continued,

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: At the end of all Holy War events, twelve nations gather for simultaneous voting. Each nation has three voting rights: first is Rom.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Rom is one vote that can be given to one's own or another country.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So if Tormia uses Rom for itself, other countries can't nullify it with Temika?

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Correct. If Rom trading becomes too active, there's no upper limit on bidding. Simply put, you can transfer one point given to you but risk it being nullified by -1 point.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Rom is key then.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Yes. For example, a country like Arakne without ambitions for leadership might sell this right at a high price. But buyers can't openly purchase due to Temika's suppression risk.
As everyone pondered this, Plu continued,

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Until voting begins, twelve nations can freely negotiate these rights. The nation with the highest votes becomes the leading nation under papal approval.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: Heheh… if kings are replaced…
It already smelled like blood.
